metadata.description: Curated collection of Claude Code skills — research, writing, and more.

plugins.name: web-tool-routing
plugins.description: Web tool routing, detection, and fallback chains for any skill that accesses websites. Provides credit-aware tool selection.

plugins.name: prompt-creator
plugins.description: Prompt engineering best practices from Anthropic and OpenAI docs. Crafts effective prompts for any LLM.

plugins.name: prompt-74
plugins.description: High-stakes prompt engineering methodology for real-world decisions and deep research. Generates structured, evidence-driven prompts using the PROMPT-74 framework.

plugins.name: web-research
plugins.description: Web research methodology with wave-based execution, query strategies, and structured output.

plugins.name: competitor-research
plugins.description: Research competitors by gathering and analyzing community feedback from Reddit, forums, and review sites.

plugins.name: researching-consumer-goods
plugins.description: Researches consumer products for purchase across global markets. Compares prices, checks availability, finds deals.

plugins.name: writing-well
plugins.description: Applies Zinsser's nonfiction writing principles — simplicity, clarity, active voice, clutter elimination — to any text.

plugins.name: plan-review
plugins.description: Reviews implementation plans and code changes with structured technical analysis across architecture, code quality, testing, performance, and risk.

plugins.name: harness-protocol
plugins.description: Orchestrator → Developer → Verifier → Auditor harness for multi-sprint / multi-file work. Generator never self-evaluates. >9/10 per-criterion threshold. Project-agnostic.

plugins.name: go
plugins.description: End-to-end feature pipeline: plan → harness protocol → plan-review → Codex audit → execute → simplify → final Codex audit. Runs inside an isolated git worktree. Codex is optional; skipped when CLI unavailable. Project-agnostic.
